name: roBrowserLegacy Authorized Reference Pack
title: roBrowserLegacy Authorized Reference Pack
description: Curated architecture notes for roBrowserLegacy as an authorized browser client reference.
changelog: 2026-05-23: Added authorized browser-client architecture reference entries.
trustPolicy: Authorized code reference is contextual for browser-client architecture and future adapters. Local project data still has priority.
conflictPolicy: Use these entries as read-only architecture hints only. They never block alone.

entries.title: roBrowserLegacy browser stack
entries.summary: roBrowserLegacy documents a browser-client stack built around Vite, WebGL, WebSockets, and Web Workers.
entries.details: The repository README describes Vite as the build/dev-server layer, WebGL for rendering, WebSockets via wsProxy, and Web Workers for GRF decompression and pathfinding. This is useful as architecture context for future API/UI and browser-client integration notes.
warnings: Authorized reference only. Preserve provenance and license notes for any future adaptation.

entries.title: roBrowserLegacy remote client relationship
entries.summary: roBrowserLegacy can pair with a remote client that serves Ragnarok assets over HTTP for browser play.
entries.details: The repository README points to RemoteClient implementations and describes remote serving of game assets to the browser client. This is relevant when planning GRF asset-serving, wsProxy orchestration, and browser-based client flows in RagnaForge.
warnings: Do not vendor the full repository by accident. Keep any future incorporation selective and traceable.
